codeReview.summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 4ef4f6f diff. The RewardCalculator implementation in sre_agent_sandbox/reward.py matches the required 5-component reward behavior (availability, latency, downtime, efficiency, safety), returns total plus component breakdown, and is covered by comprehensive tests in tests/test_reward.py including boundaries and stacking scenarios.

summary: Pass. I found no high-confidence correctness issues in the reward-calculator feature implementation or its associated tests.
